name: Android Agent
description: Android development execution agent. Implements Jira tickets as Android code changes, creates feature branches and pull requests via the SCM agent.

skills.name: Android Task Execute
skills.description: Implements an Android development task. Analyzes the task, fetches Jira context and design references, generates Kotlin/Java code, writes files to the shared workspace, creates a feature branch and pull request via the SCM agent, and reports completion via callback.
